ARNOLD W. EVJE II, PRO TEM JUDGE. D. CARTER, CLERK. DIANA PADILLA, CSR. PARTIES PRESENT WERE ROLAND LIE, ESQ. ATTORNEY FOR THE PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER COOK WHO WAS PRESENT. JUANITA RIELOFF WAS ALSO PRESENT. COURT SUPERVISED STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT REACHED. TERMS REPORTED ON THE RECORD. SEE CLERK MINUTES FOR DETAILS.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES, FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOK, CHRISTOPHER

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIELOFF, JUANITA INDIVIDUALLY RIELOFF, JUANITA, IND. & AS PROJECT COORDINATOR OF PROMOTORAS COMUNITARIAS DE SALUD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2122 MISSION ST & 11 CLARION ST. APT 1,2,3, S.F. $19,200.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,200.00, LEASE FORFEITED, DFTS TO PAY $2,000- BY 4PM 2/19/98, BALANCE AT $1,250- P/M STARTING 4/1/98 BY CERT FUNDS + RENT(CURRENT $2,000).FAIL TO COMPLY & DFTS EVICTED,DEFTS TO LEAVE PREMISES BRROM CLEAN, PERS PROP LEFT ABANDONED. NO FURTHER STAYS. AMD JUDG INCLUDE ATTY FEES & COSTS. PLTF GIVE NEUTRAL REF. - SEE JUDGMENT-.
